title: A Starry Night
content:
A cloud fell down from the heavens,
    And broke on the mountain's brow;
    It scattered the dusky fragments
    All over the vale below.

    The moon and the stars were anxious
    To know what its fate might be;
    So they rushed to the azure op'ning,
    And all peered down to see.
meaning: About: Paul Laurence Dunbar was a seminal American poet of the late 19th and early 20th centuries. Dunbar gained national recognition for his 1896 Lyrics of a Lowly Life, one poem in the collection being Ode to Ethiopia.
